article_title: Bylaw 14752 — Housing Agreement (4990 Bennett Street) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Locks In Non-Market Rental Units at 4990 Bennett Street via Housing Agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council adopted Bylaw 14752 on July 8, 2025, authorising a legally binding housing agreement with LM Riviera Homes Ltd. requiring non-market rental units in their 6-storey rental podium at 4990 Bennett Street to remain affordable housing.
briefs.action_required: Review the Housing Agreement terms and ensure non-market unit management, tenant eligibility, and rent-setting comply with the agreement.
briefs.article_title: Bylaw 14752 — Housing Agreement (4990 Bennett Street) Bylaw 2025
